training_data: Synthetic dataset (500 samples) based on published Pakistani antibiogram rates
preprocessing: Label encoding for categorical variables, 70/30 train/test split
limitations: Trained on synthetic data — not validated on real clinical isolates
Not for clinical use without prospective validation
Model may not generalize to other geographic regions or hospital settings
intended_use: Research prototype for antimicrobial stewardship education and methodological demonstration
ethical_considerations: No real patient data was used
Predictions are probabilistic and should not replace culture-based sensitivity testing
The tool includes explicit disclaimers against clinical use
citation: Chand Javed. AMR Prediction Tool. GitHub repository. 2025.
